turns.speaker: Newcomer
turns.text: Since moving here I feel lost between two worlds. I miss home and I don't belong in this culture.

turns.speaker: Counselor
turns.text: That in-between feeling can be so isolating. How have you been coping?

turns.speaker: Newcomer
turns.text: Not well. The language barrier wears me down and I feel anxious and alone most days.
